title: Set Worker Rlimit and Connection Limits
description: Limit worker processes and connections to prevent resource exhaustion DoS.

implementation.apache: Limit max connections at OS level with ulimit

verification: nginx -t passes; concurrent connections handled without crashing

title: Implement Rate Limiting per IP
description: Use limit_req and limit_conn modules to throttle requests and connections per client.

implementation.nginx: limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=general:10m rate=10r/s; limit_req zone=general burst=20 nodelay;

verification: Excessive rate returns 503 or 429; legit traffic not impacted

title: Configure Buffer Sizes to Prevent Overflow
description: Set client_body_buffer_size, client_header_buffer_size, and proxy buffers to prevent memory exhaustion.
verification: Large malformed headers return 414 or 400 without memory spike

title: Harden SSL/TLS and Enable OCSP Stapling
description: Enforce TLS 1.2+, disable weak ciphers, enable OCSP stapling, and configure session tickets.

implementation.nginx: ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3; ssl_ciphers 'ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384'; ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on; ssl_stapling on; ssl_stapling_verify on;

verification: SSL Labs test shows A+ rating; OCSP stapling enabled

title: Hide Nginx Version Number
description: Prevent nginx from revealing version in error pages and headers.
verification: curl -I shows Server: nginx only, no version number; error pages generic

title: Add Security Headers
description: Configure X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, HSTS, CSP, and Referrer-Policy via add_header.

implementation.nginx: add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN always; add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff always; add_header Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin; add_header Strict-Transport-Security max-age=31536000 always;

verification: curl -I shows all security headers on all responses

title: Disable Directory Listing and Autoindex
description: Ensure autoindex is off to prevent directory listing of file contents.

implementation.nginx: autoindex off; in http or server block

verification: Access directory without index returns 403 or 404, not file list

title: Block PHP Execution in Upload Directories
description: Prevent execution of PHP and other scripts in user-upload directories.

implementation.nginx: location /uploads/ { location ~ \.php$ { deny all; } } location /wp-content/uploads/ { location ~ \.php$ { deny all; } }

verification: Upload PHP to uploads; direct access returns 403 Forbidden

title: Secure Gzip Settings
description: Avoid compressing responses that contain user input; be aware of BREACH attack implications.

implementation.nginx: gzip_types text/plain text/css application/json application/javascript; gzip_min_length 1000;

verification: No compression of user-sensitive query results; use HTTPS to mitigate BREACH

title: Enable Detailed Access Logging
description: Log all requests with real_ip, user agent, response time, and status to filesystem.
verification: Access log contains request time and full user agent strings

title: Hide Backend Headers and Use Custom Values
description: Strip backend headers (X-Powered-By, Server) from upstream responses before sending to client.

implementation.nginx: proxy_hide_header X-Powered-By; proxy_hide_header Server; fastcgi_hide_header X-Powered-By;

verification: curl -I shows no X-Powered-By or upstream Server headers

title: Force HTTPS Redirect and HSTS Preload
description: Redirect all HTTP to HTTPS with 301 and include HSTS preload directives.

implementation.nginx: server { listen 80; return 301 https://$host$request_uri; } add_header Strict-Transport-Security max-age=63072000 always; includeSubDomains; preload

verification: http:// redirects to https:// with 301; HSTS header present

title: Validate Referer for Sensitive Actions
description: Use valid_referers to block hotlinking and unexpected cross-site requests for protected content.
verification: Hotlinking images from external site returns 403

title: Limit Allowed HTTP Methods
description: Only allow GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE needed by application. Block TRACE/OPTIONS if not needed.
verification: TRACE request returns 405; DELETE request returns 405 if not allowed

title: Implement Content Security Policy
description: Set CSP headers to prevent XSS and data injection attacks.

implementation.nginx: add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self';" always;

verification: Browser dev tools show CSP header; no console violations

title: Configure Custom Error Pages
description: Replace default error pages with custom pages that do not leak information.
verification: Trigger 404 and 500; custom error page shown with no version info

title: Use Geo or Map for Access Control
description: Block or rate-limit countries/regions by IP using geo module or third-party geo DB.

implementation.nginx: geoip_country /usr/share/GeoIP/GeoIP.dat; map $geoip_country_code $allowed_country { default no; US yes; } if ($allowed_country = no) { return 403; }

verification: Requests from blocked country IP return 403; allowed countries pass

title: Strict X-Frame-Options for Clickjacking
description: Add X-Frame-Options DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent your site from being framed by attackers.
verification: Embedding in iframe on another domain is blocked by browser
